at per hour or per diem rates in accordance with section 3 of the Legislative Pay Act of 1929, as amended (; ), relating to employees performing professional and technical services for the Architect of the Capitol in connection with construction projects and employees under the Office of the Architect of the Capitol whose tenure of employment is temporary or of uncertain duration; or46 Stat. 3855 Stat. 615
